analysis.consistency: Consistent with established D&D 5e Fighter class features.
analysis.quality: High quality. The description is clear, concise, and accurately reflects the mechanical impact of the feature.

mechanics.effect: Grants one additional action (which can be used as a regular action or bonus action replacement, as per standard action rules).
mechanics.cost: Requires short or long rest to recharge (1 use).

scaling.effect: Increases uses to 2 per rest, with the caveat that only one use can be applied on the same turn (preventing an immediate double Action Surge).

mechanics.clarification_needed: None; the description is standard and precise.
